summary:
There is no mention in the provided evidence of tocilizumab or IL-6 receptor blockade. Consequently, based solely on the available documentation, it cannot be confirmed that tocilizumab blocks the IL-6 receptor.  

(Note: While externally recognized as an IL-6 antagonist, this summary adheres strictly to the specified evidentiary constraints.)
